Bartendaz Pro

The fast, simple bar POS for owners and cashiers. Manage products, wallets, and staff — all from your Android device.

Download for Android APK · Android 7.0+

Everything your bar needs

🍺

Fast POS

Ring up drinks and snacks in seconds. Built for speed behind the bar.

💰

Wallet System

Owners and cashiers each have a wallet. Track every transaction in real time.

👥

Staff Management

Add cashiers, set permissions, suspend or remove staff instantly.

📦

Product Catalog

Manage your full menu with photos, prices, categories, and stock levels.

📊

Sales Reports

Download PDF reports of your sales and transactions anytime.

🔒

Secure & Private

Your data stays in your Supabase account. No third-party access.

📞

Free Installation & Setup Available

Need help getting started? We'll set up everything for you at no extra cost.

Call WhatsApp

+1 868 385-0635

How to install

1

Download the APK

Tap the download button above on your Android device.

2

Allow unknown sources

When prompted, tap "Install anyway" or go to Settings → Security → allow installs from this source.

3

Open and sign in

Launch Bartendaz Pro and sign in with your owner account or cashier username.

Ready to run your bar smarter?

Download now and choose your plan after signing up. Starting at $300 TT for 6 months.

Bartendaz.
Pro

📞 +1 868 385-0635

Run your bar like a business — not a guessing game.

The only POS that lets you track stock, manage staff, and see your real profits — live.

📦 Stock Tracking 💰 Live Financials 👥 Multi-Cashier 💳 Credit Tabs 🍾 Bottles & Packs 📊 Owner Reports
  • 📦
    Real-time stock control. Every bottle, pack, and product tracked automatically. Get low-stock alerts before you run dry.
  • 💰
    Know your money, always. Income, expenses, net profit and resale value — calculated live, no spreadsheets.
  • 👥
    Owner + Cashier accounts. Cashiers sell, you stay in control. Every transaction logged, every wallet tracked.
  • 💳
    Credit tab management. Open tabs, record payments, track who owes what — with full history.
  • 🎵
    Built-in music player. Keep the vibes going without switching apps.
